title: Color Mixing Lab
description: A color prediction game where kids assemble two paint swatches, a pot, and the revealed mixed color.
learningGoals: Connect two inputs with one visible result
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap color swatches and the result onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct swatches pop, sparkle, and speak the color name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds speak the color equation.
credits: Kaigani; swatch and emoji placeholder art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
